name: before-its-gone-electron
description: Electron desktop shell for Before It's Gone

scripts.dev: npm run build && cross-env ELECTRON_OZONE_PLATFORM_HINT=auto electron .
scripts.package:macos: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../release', {recursive: true})" && electron-builder --config electron-builder.macos.yml --mac dmg --publish never -c.electronVersion=42.0.1
scripts.package:windows: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../release', {recursive: true})" && electron-builder --config electron-builder.windows.yml --win nsis portable --publish never -c.electronVersion=42.0.1
